Whether you're exploring off-the-beaten-path trails or embarking on a cross-country road trip this truck is designed to get you there in comfort and style. In summary the 2026 Chevrolet Colorado Trail Boss is not just a vehicle; it's a lifestyle choice. It's for those who seek adventure who crave power and who desire a vehicle that can keep up with their active lives. With its combination of striking looks powerful performance and cutting-edge features this truck is ready to redefine what it means to drive. So why wait? Make the all-new 2026 Chevrolet Colorado Trail Boss yours today and start your journey toward unparalleled excitement and adventure. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. description: CarFax No Accidents!  CarFax One Owner!     Popular Options and Features Include: Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. description: Audi Marin is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2025 Audi A5 quattro Premium Plus Dressed in a sleek and commanding Mythos Black Metallic and paired with a refined Black interior, this luxury sportback delivers a compelling blend of sharp design, cutting-edge technology, and confident quattro® performance. The bold design is accentuated by 18 5-arm-twist design wheels, LED headlights with digital DRL and high beam assist, and LED taillights with dynamic turn signals, giving it an unmistakably modern presence.  Inside, the cabin boasts the Premium Plus package, adding luxurious upgrades including a Bang & Olufsen® 3D sound system, head-up display, heated steering wheel with hands-on detection, park assist plus, top view camera system, dynamic interaction light, and USB power delivery. Additional features include Audi MMI® Navigation plus, a 14.5 touchscreen display, Audi virtual cockpit plus with an 11.9 screen, and ventilated front sport seats with memory and lumbar support. The Warm Weather Package enhances comfort with manual rear side window sunshades and other seasonal luxuries .  Engine and Performance: The A5 Sportback is powered by a responsive 2.0-liter TFSI® inline-4 engine mated to a 7-speed S tronic® dual-clutch transmission, delivering 261 horsepower and 273 lb-ft of torque through Audi's legendary quattro® all-wheel drive system. Audi Drive Select allows for tailored driving dynamics, and it achieves an EPA-estimated 26 MPG combined (22 city / 31 highway).   Key Features:   Premium Plus Package: B&O 3D sound, head-up display, adaptive cruise assist, top view camera, park assist plus, and more.  Warm Weather Package: Ventilated front sport seats and manual rear sunshades.  Audi MMI® Navigation Plus & Virtual Cockpit: 14.5 touchscreen + 11.9 digital instrument cluster for seamless control.  LED Lighting Suite: Headlights with digital DRL and LED taillights with dynamic turn signals.  quattro® AWD with 261 hp & 273 lb-ft Torque: Dynamic, efficient, and all-weather capable.  Includes Two Key Fobs: Delivered complete with both original keys.  Certified Pre-Owned Benefits:   Comprehensive Coverage: Balance of Audi's 5-Year/Unlimited Mile CPO Limited Warranty from the original in-service date.  300+ Point Dealer Inspection: Rigorous multi-point inspection conducted by factory-trained technicians.  24/7 Roadside Assistance: Nationwide support with towing, flat tire change, battery jump, and lock-out assistance.  CARFAX® Vehicle History Report: Provides transparency and peace of mind.  Special Financing Offers: Available through Audi Financial Services for qualified buyers. description: Audi Marin is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2025 Audi A5 quattro Dressed in a refined Chronos Gray Metallic and paired with a sleek Black interior, this bold sportback embodies the progressive spirit of Audi design and engineering. Highlighted by the Premium Plus Package, this A5 is equipped with striking LED headlights with digital DRL, dynamic taillight animation, and a panoramic glass roof with variable light control that adds both aesthetic and functional luxury. Stylish 18 5-arm-twist design wheels wrapped in all-season run flat tires offer year-round confidence and performance.  Inside, you are surrounded by luxurious touches including natural wood inlays, illuminated front door sills, and the LED interior lighting pro package. The Bang & Olufsen® 3D sound system, MMI® Navigation Plus, and a high-resolution 14.5 center touchscreen along with the 11.9 Audi Virtual Cockpit Plus provide cutting-edge connectivity and clarity. Comfort features include heated front sport seats with ventilation, manual rear side window sunshades, a heated steering wheel with hands-on detection, power adjustable steering column, and three-zone automatic climate control. Extras like the Audi Beam Rings and Audi Guard protection kit complete the elevated cabin experience.  Engine and Performance: This A5 is powered by a spirited 2.0-liter TFSI® turbocharged inline-4 engine producing a robust 261 horsepower and 273 lb-ft of torque. Mated to a 7-speed S tronic® dual-clutch transmission and Audi's iconic quattro® all-wheel drive, it offers both performance and precision with every drive.    Key Features:   Premium Plus Package: Includes B&O® sound, head-up display, park assist, LED animation, heated steering wheel, top view camera, and more.  Warm Weather Package: Ventilated front sport seats and manual rear side window sunshades.  MMI® Touch Display & Audi Virtual Cockpit Plus: 14.5 center screen and 11.9 digital display for seamless control and visibility.  quattro® AWD & Turbocharged Engine: Delivers 261 hp and 273 lb-ft of torque for thrilling, all-season performance.  LED Headlights, Audi Beam Rings & Natural Wood Inlays: Modern style with refined interior ambiance.  Certified Pre-Owned Benefits: Includes a 1-Year/20,000-Mile CPO Limited Warranty (after new vehicle coverage ends), 125+ point inspection, vehicle history report, 24/7 roadside assistance, and trip interruption protection. description: Discover the ultimate in versatility and comfort with the 2025 Subaru Forester Limited. This exceptional SUV offers a captivating blend of sophisticated style, advanced technology, and uncompromising performance, making it the perfect companion for your adventures.  Boasting a stunning Red exterior, the Forester Limited commands attention with its sleek and modern design. Under the hood, a powerful 2.5L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine paired with Lineartronic CVT and Subaru's renowned All-Wheel Drive system delivers an exceptional driving experience, with an impressive 26 city / 33 highway MPG.  Elevate your driving experience with the following premium features:   HARMAN/KARDON AUDIO & NAVIGATION & RAB  Reverse Automatic Braking (RAB) System  Subaru 11.6" Multimedia Navigation System  Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto  Panoramic Power Moonroof  Power Liftgate  Heated Front Bucket Seats  Perforated Leather-Trimmed Upholstery  Auto-Dimming Mirror with Compass and HomeLink  Rear Bumper Cover and Splash Guards  All-Weather Floor Liners  Rear Seatback Protector  Step inside the Forester Limited and be captivated by the premium Harman/Kardon audio system, delivering a concert-hall experience from every seat. The intuitive 11.6-inch multimedia navigation system, with voice controls and wireless smartphone integration, puts the world at your fingertips.  Designed with your comfort and convenience in mind, the Forester Limited pampers you with features like dual-zone automatic climate control, a power driver's seat, and a heated steering wheel. The spacious cabin and versatile cargo area make it the perfect companion for your active lifestyle, whether you're embarking on a family road trip or tackling your next outdoor adventure.  Safety is paramount in the Forester Limited, with a suite of advanced driver-assist technologies, including Reverse Automatic Braking, that work tirelessly to keep you and your loved ones protected.  Experience the exceptional 2025 Subaru Forester Limited for yourself. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this remarkable SUV can elevate your driving experience.  Call us at 510-860-4470. Right off the 80 on San Pablo Ave or online at www.elcerrtiohonda.com.  More than just a car dealership... Popular Options and Features Include: Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.  We believe that a Honda Certified Pre-Owned vehicle is one of the best values on the road. description: CarFax No Accidents!  CarFax One Owner!     Popular Options and Features Include: Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Wireless Apple CarPlay/Wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring   As a family owned and operated business, Hayward Honda is committed to being a supportive member of our East Bay community. description: The 2025 Tesla Model 3 Long Range RWD is a sleek, all-electric sedan designed for efficiency, performance, and advanced technology. Powered by a single electric motor, it delivers approximately 341 horsepower and 364 lb-ft of torque, sprinting from 0 to 60 mph in about 5.3 seconds. With an EPA-estimated range of 390 miles, its one of the most capable long-range EVs in its class.Finished in a clean white exterior with a minimalist black interior, the cabin is futuristic yet comfortable. Heated front and rear seats, a heated steering wheel, ambient lighting, and a panoramic glass roof enhance the driving experience. The large 15-inch central touchscreen controls nearly all vehicle functions, complemented by a rear-seat touchscreen for passenger convenience.Technology is at the forefront with Teslas premium audio system, wireless phone charging, blindspot cameras, and over-the-air software updates that continuously improve functionality. Safety is comprehensive with Teslas suite of driver assistance features, including Autopilot, adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, collision avoidance, and emergency braking. Practical touches like a front trunk (frunk), dual-zone climate control, and phone-as-key entry round out the package.This vehicle was repurchased by the manufacturer due to a complaint from the previous owner. Despite having resolved the issue, the manufacturer stepped in to promote customer satisfaction or to comply with local laws and repurchased the vehicle. As a result, this vehicle is known as a manufacturer/lemon law buyback. *VERY IMPORTANT* The remainder of the factory limited warranties remain intact with this vehicle, and extended warranties are also available. description: Introducing the **2025 Subaru Crosstrek Sport**, a standout vehicle that embodies a perfect fusion of performance, safety, and advanced technology. The Crosstrek Sport is powered by a robust 2.5L H-4 gasoline direct injection engine, delivering an impressive 182 horsepower, paired with an 8-speed Lineartronic CVT for a smooth driving experience on any terrain.This vehicle is designed with your safety in mind. The ***hands-on cruise control*** feature revolutionizes road trips by maintaining your desired speed and ensuring a safe distance from other vehicles, allowing you to relax and enjoy the journey. Meanwhile, the ***forward collision mitigation*** system is your vigilant co-pilot, continuously scanning the road ahead and activating essential safety measures to reduce the risk of accidents.Another impressive feature is the ***front pedestrian impact prevention***, which enhances awareness by detecting pedestrians in your path and taking necessary actions to prevent collisions. This is especially vital in busy urban areas, where pedestrian traffic is high.The ***rear camera with washer*** provides a clear view of the area behind your vehicle, even in inclement weather, ensuring youre aware of any obstacles. Complementing this is the ***lane departure prevention*** system, which helps keep you securely in your lane, further enhancing safety and reducing the likelihood of accidents.Navigating congested traffic is made simpler with the ***adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go*** feature. This intelligent system adjusts your speed automatically to maintain a safe following distance, even bringing the vehicle to a complete stop when necessary and resuming pace when traffic moves. This significantly reduces driver fatigue during long commutes.Additionally, the ***predictive brake assist*** system prepares your brakes for maximum stopping power, ensuring youre always ready to respond to sudden stops in traffic.In conclusion, the **2025 Subaru Crosstrek Sport** isnt just a vehicle; its a comprehensive package of performance, safety, and technology that enhances every driving experience. Embrace the future of driving with the Crosstrek Sport and discover how it keeps you safe and in control on every journey. Experience the remarkable features of the Crosstrek Sport today and elevate your driving adventures!Discover why Norm Reeves Subaru Superstore is your ultimate destination in *Rockwall*, *Dallas*, *Garland*, *Wylie*, and the surrounding areas. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot. Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Active blind spot system - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. An active blind spot system not only alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear but helps prevent you from making an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with the confidence and safety of the Active blind spot system. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.    Please stop by our showroom at: 2302 East 4th. Street North Platte NE, 69101 We appreciate you taking the time today to visit our website.
